retry_reason: Failure is due to memory allocation failure (kzalloc or usb_alloc_urb). While transient, retrying is not part of the intended usage pattern; the caller should handle the NULL return appropriately.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is initialization of a queue of USB request objects, including allocation of URBs and list setup. The URB reference count management (via usb_alloc_urb/usb_free_urb) is an implementation detail of error cleanup, not the core purpose. The function does not acquire or release a caller-managed reference.
